title: Create shared test vectors for Rust/Zephyr parity
description: Both implementations must pass identical test vectors. Create JSON/CBOR test cases for: (1) SCHC compression/decompression, (2) Link frame encode/decode + MIC, (3) RPL DIO/DAO/DAO-ACK parse/generate, (4) OSCORE encrypt/decrypt. Store in spec/test-vectors/. Both CI pipelines run against these.
close_reason: Partial compliance: Core vectors exist in test/vectors/ (SCHC: 5 vectors, link_frame: 4 vectors, schnorr48: 6 vectors). Documented in test/vectors/README.md as canonical location (not spec/test-vectors/). GAPS filed as sub-beads: project-LICHEN-1dj6 (OSCORE vectors missing entirely), project-LICHEN-cdmc (RPL standalone parse/generate vectors - only SCHC-level coverage exists). Closing with --force as this bead provides vectors needed by k5zk, not the reverse.
